prompt: Give me Python code to run an agentic workflow with canvas streaming
What is the AgentWorkflow API
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "AgentWorkflow", "explanation": "AgentWorkflow(intent, tenant_id, canvas) is the entrypoint of the agentic workflow service. It sends the intent to VxThinkingLLM (port 8745) for classification, asks Anthropic to derive an executable agent plan, and dispatches each agent step against scripts/ and shared/terraform/ pre-built modules. canvas=True renders the live execution DAG."}

prompt: Explain how AgentWorkflow run works
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "AgentWorkflow.run", "explanation": "workflow.run() calls /api/v2/workflow/execute on the tenant node. The Go executor (services/workflow/agentic_executor.go) calls VxThinkingLLM for intent + RAG, then Anthropic for a step plan, then dispatches each step. SupervisorAgent emits the plan; ProvisioningAgent / SecurityAgent / ObservabilityAgent / FinOpsAgent / NotificationAgent / SLOAgent run their tasks; canvas=True keeps the UI in sync."}

prompt: What are the standard agents in an AgentWorkflow
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "standard_agents", "explanation": "SupervisorAgent (planner), ProvisioningAgent (cloud resources), SecurityAgent (CIS/HIPAA/PCI scans), ObservabilityAgent (Prometheus/Grafana/OTel), FinOpsAgent (cost tagging + drift), NotificationAgent (email/Slack reports), SLOAgent (alerts + escalation), DNSAgent (Cloudflare/Route53), DeployAgent (rolling deploys), CICDAgent (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI), BackupAgent + DRAgent (backup + restore verify), ComplianceAgent (HIPAA/PCI attestation), IAMAgent (credential rotation), SchedulerAgent (auto-cleanup, TTLs)."}

prompt: What does SupervisorAgent do
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "SupervisorAgent", "explanation": "SupervisorAgent receives the intent and the canvas, classifies it via VxThinkingLLM, then asks Anthropic for an ordered agent plan. It emits the plan as the wave-0 step; downstream agents are spawned by the dispatcher."}

prompt: What does ProvisioningAgent do
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "ProvisioningAgent", "explanation": "ProvisioningAgent provisions cloud resources via shared/terraform/ pre-built modules (aws/, azure/, gcp/, cloudflare/, ...). It does NOT generate Terraform HCL - it only invokes existing modules with tfvars derived from the intent."}

prompt: What does SecurityAgent do
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "SecurityAgent", "explanation": "SecurityAgent runs CIS / HIPAA / PCI / SOC2 benchmark scans via scripts/ai/ + scripts/security/ tools (kube-bench, prowler, checkov, tfsec, trivy). Reports flow back to the canvas + NotificationAgent."}

prompt: What does ObservabilityAgent do
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "ObservabilityAgent", "explanation": "ObservabilityAgent installs Prometheus + Grafana (or Cloud-native equivalents on Azure/GCP) via scripts/prometheus/, scripts/grafana/, scripts/opentelemetry/ install scripts. Wires dashboards + default alert rules."}

prompt: What does FinOpsAgent do
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "FinOpsAgent", "explanation": "FinOpsAgent tags every resource with the tenant cost center, detects untagged drift, and appends a cost delta to each canvas node. It is also the auditor for the weekly FinOps sweep."}

prompt: Why does the canvas not disappear during agentic execution
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "canvas_evolves", "explanation": "The canvas evolves rather than disappears. Construction (manual wiring) becomes Observation (agents render their own DAG). Failures show the remediation path. Changes to the intent re-plan the graph live. One sentence of intent replaces 50 manually wired nodes."}

prompt: Explain how live execution DAG rendering works

prompt: Explain the execution strategy options sequential parallel and dag

prompt: Explain how AgentWorkflow differs from n8n
action_json: {"action": "workflow_agentic_explain", "topic": "agentic_vs_n8n", "explanation": "n8n: 50 manually wired nodes per workflow, static DAG, manual fix on failure, manual rewire on change, no cost visibility.
